allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix pricing cards overflow in narrow panel

- Stack pricing tiers vertically instead of horizontal grid
- Compact card layout with horizontal header \(name + price\)
- Limit visible features to 4 with "+N more" indicator
- Remove absolute positioning that caused overflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
